title: Stout Whisk Delight
description: A high-protein-friendly umami-rich dish featuring stout and whisk in a one-pot greek style.

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Full-fat for more protein and flavor

ingredients.name: Crumbled Feta Cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional, can be substituted with other high-protein cheese like gouda or cheddar

ingredients.name: Minced Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely to release its natural sweetness and umami

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: Whole eggs or beaten, depending on texture preference

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing and adding umami depth

ingredients.name: Water or Low-Sodium Broth
ingredients.notes: To thin the mixture for a more smooth texture

instructions: In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced onion and garlic. Cook until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Pour in stout beer, whisk to combine thoroughly, and stir in water or broth.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for 10-12 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Whisk in Greek yogurt. For a smoother texture, you may need to add more liquid like water or Low-Sodium Broth until it reaches desired consistency.
Add eggs one at a time while stirring continuously; this creates an emulsified mixture and helps distribute the protein evenly.
